changelog: FIX (DEV ONLY): Sports section visual + navigation polish. (1) Score numbers reduced from 38sp to 28sp so they no longer clip the bottom of 220dp cards. (2) Added an opaque dark scrim under the league pills + cards so the hero image never bleeds through the gap below the hero. (3) Hero team logos now use ContentScale.Fit (was Crop) and a softened 1.00→1.04 Ken Burns scale so the FULL logo is visible — no more cropped half-badges. (4) UP from Streaming Services · Movies now returns to Sports (was incorrectly skipping back to Discovery). Sports added to pageOrder so the page-up indicator chevrons + slide direction also work.
Mandatory:true so v1.44.7 / v1.44.8 devices force-update.
